name: lifecycle_initial_state
description: The key of the single state with isInitial: true in this Lifecycle. Exactly one state must have isInitial; this field references it. The initial state must have effective status: active (V9).

aiGuidance.purpose: Names the entry point state for new Records bound to this Lifecycle. Must match a LifecycleState.key in the effective state set where isInitial is true.
